lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible wear and some minor dents. The interior shows signs of use and aging. It is currently operational but may require maintenance or minor repairs.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear, including tears in the upholstery and stains. The engine and transmission require repair.

Get ready to experience automotive perfection! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a car in truly showroom-ready shape and top-tier quality!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, meticulously maintained to showroom standards. The exterior is flawless, featuring a deep, original shine with no chips, scratches, or imperfections. Inside, the interior is pristine, with no signs of wear on the upholstery and all features in perfect working order. It has been garage-kept and professionally serviced, making it a rare find for a discerning buyer looking for a top-tier vehicle.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant attention to return it to reliable service. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the door panels, and a cracked windshield. Inside, the cabin shows its age with torn upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several electronic components that no longer function correctly. Mechanically, the engine starts but runs roughly, and there is a persistent leak in the power steering system. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a project vehicle or for someone willing to invest in major repairs.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained, both the interior and exterior reflect a commitment to quality preservation. With a comprehensive service history and a rigorous inspection completed, this automobile ensures a sophisticated driving experience and continued mechanical integrity. We invite you to acquire a machine that exemplifies enduring engineering excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car, and it has been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable ride for someone who wants a vehicle that still looks and feels great on the road. I've taken great care of it, and it's totally ready for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat and tell you more about it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission pairs with a factory-spec limited-slip differential for precise torque vectoring. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement. Suspension geometry remains tight with Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings. The chassis exhibits excellent torsional rigidity, and the high-revving valvetrain remains crisp. A mechanically sound, driver-focused example with all critical maintenance addressed.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Mechanically sound. Minimal wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and performance for the discerning driver. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor, unavoidable road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather seating, a pristine headliner, and a fully functional suite of electronics and climate controls. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. It recently underwent a comprehensive multi-point inspection, receiving fresh fluids, a new battery, and a brake service. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the engine runs smooth and quiet. This is a turn-key example ready for its next chapter, providing a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure dependable performance. It offers a sophisticated balance of luxury and utility, standing as a testament to diligent ownership and proactive care.

Presented for your consideration is a distinguished example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been curated to meet our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. It offers a refined driving dynamic and remains in commendable condition, representing a premier investment for those who prioritize both prestige and dependability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super well-maintained—honestly, it runs like a dream! Perfect for anyone looking for a reliable, stylish set of wheels that’s ready for the road right now. I’ve taken great care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love it just as much as I have.
